languages.text: Every time the Pet's ability is used on the Overseer or an ally, for 1 round they receive +5 to stats considered key stats for this Pet.

languages.text: Whenever a familiar's {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} is used on an ally (can be the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}), for 1 round, that ally gains a +5 bonus to {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} considered to be key characteristics of the familiar.

languages.text: Chaque fois que la {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacité{/g} d'un familier est utilisée sur un allié (y compris le {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}surveillant{/g}), celui-ci gagne un bonus de +5 aux caractéristiques considérées comme des {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}caractéristiques{/g} clés du familier.

languages.text: 每当使仆对盟友（也可以是{g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}监察官{/g}）使用{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}能力{/g}时，根据使仆的关键属性，该名盟友的相应{g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}属性{/g}也会提高5点。

languages.text: Cuando se usa una {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacidad{/g} de familiar sobre un aliado (puede ser el {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}supervisor{/g}), el aliado obtiene una bonificación +5 a las {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}características{/g} que se consideran clave para el familiar.

languages.text: Bir iyenin {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}kabiliyeti{/g} bir dost birimin ({g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Gözetmen{/g} de olabilir) üzerinde kullanıldığında o dost birim, iyenin kilit nitelikleri sayılan {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}niteliklerine{/g} +5 bonus kazanır.
